name: Zhiyun Smooth 5S AI 3-Axis Smartphone Gimbal
description: The Smooth 5S AI Pro 3-Axis Smartphone Gimbal from Zhiyun-Tech provides you with a 3-axis gimbal stabilizer, an AI tracking unit that enhances its subject tracking, and a magnetic fill light.

features.Key Features:: 3-Axis Stabilizer for Vlogging | 360° Rotation, Vortex Mode | Integrated and Magnetic Fill Light | AI Tracker | 5.3 to 10.6 Load Capacity | Supports Smartphones 2 to 3.5" Wide | All-in-One Control Panel | Advanced Stabilization Algorithm | Bluetooth 5.1 Connectivity | 26-Hour Runtime in Standby Mode | Zhiyun Smooth 5S AI 3-Axis Smartphone Gimbal | Mini Tripod | USB-C Charging Cable | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty | Zhiyun AI Tracker for Smooth 5S AI Gimbal | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty | Zhiyun TransMount Magnetic Fill Light for Smooth-5 | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty | Fill Light Filter Set | Wrist Strap | Storage Case
